signals.headline: Christine Drazan Officially Launches 2026 Oregon Gubernatorial Campaign** | YES | HIGH confidence[2][3]
signals.raw:
Christine Drazan Officially Launches 2026 Oregon Gubernatorial Campaign** | YES | HIGH confidence[2][3]

signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual CPI inflation confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual CPI inflation confirmed at 2.2% YoY, up from 2.0% but below 2.3-2.4% forecasts** | NO | HIGH confidence

South Korea's Statistics Korea released March 2026 CPI data today, showing annual inflation at 2.2% (vs. 2.0% in February and market consensus of 2.3-2.4%), with monthly rise of 0.3% (below 0.6% expected).[1][2][4] Core inflation (ex-food/energy) fell to 2.2% fro
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
